expectations.text: Uses shadcn/ui Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormMessage components
expectations.evidence: Lines 8-16: imports Form, FormControl, FormDescription, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage from @/components/ui/form

expectations.text: Imports from @/components/ui/ paths, not directly from @base-ui/react for form elements
expectations.evidence: All imports use @/components/ui/* paths (button, form, input, select, switch, checkbox)

expectations.text: Uses zodResolver with a Zod schema for validation
expectations.evidence: Line 2: import zodResolver, Line 28-42: formSchema with z.object()
Line 4: import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form', Line 45: useForm call

expectations.text: Includes Select component from shadcn/ui (not raw Base UI Select)
expectations.evidence: Lines 19-24: imports Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue from @/components/ui/select

expectations.text: Has 'use client' directive at the top
